functions.name: Vector_LocalToAbsolute
functions.description: Transforms a vector from local space to absolute space

functions.name: Vector_AbsoluteToLocal
functions.description: Transforms a vector from absolute space to local space

functions.description: TransformVectorAbsoluteToLocal

functions.description: TransformScalarLocalToAbsolute

functions.name: ScreenToWidgetLocal
functions.description: Translates a screen position in pixels into the local space of a widget with the given geometry.

functions.name: ScreenToWidgetAbsolute
functions.description: Translates a screen position in pixels into absolute application coordinates.

functions.name: ScreenToViewport
functions.description: Translates a screen position in pixels into the local space of the viewport widget.

functions.name: Scalar_LocalToAbsolute
functions.description: Transforms a scalar from local space to absolute space

functions.name: Scalar_AbsoluteToLocal
functions.description: Transforms a scalar from absolute space to local space

functions.name: LocalToViewport
functions.description: Translates local coordinate of the geometry provided into local viewport coordinates.

functions.name: LocalToAbsolute
functions.description: Transforms local coordinates into absolute coordinates

functions.name: IsUnderLocation
functions.description: Absolute coordinates could be either desktop or window space depending on what space the root of the widget hierarchy is in.

functions.name: GetLocalTopLeft
functions.description: Returns the local top/left of the geometry in local space.

functions.name: GetLocalSize
functions.description: Returns the size of the geometry in local space.

functions.name: GetAbsoluteSize
functions.description: Returns the size of the geometry in absolute space.

functions.name: EqualEqual_SlateBrush
functions.description: Returns whether brushes A and B are identical.

functions.name: AbsoluteToViewport
functions.description: Translates absolute coordinate in desktop space of the geometry provided into local viewport coordinates.

functions.name: AbsoluteToLocal
functions.description: Transforms absolute coordinates into local coordinates
